en:
Five Nights At Leboeuf just got a MASSIVE UPDATE.

Thanks to your patience, I was able
to put on an amazing update.
This updates includes a lot of fun things!

Without any further ado, have fun! :)

(open URL to check devlogs)
fr:
Five Nights At Leboeuf a eu une MISE A JOUR MASSIVE.

Grace à votre patience, j'ai pu realiser
une mise a jour incroyable.
Cette mise a jour inclut beaucoup de choses fun!

Sans plus attendre, amusez-vous! :)

(ouvrez l'URL pour voir le devlog)
jp:
Five Nights At Leboeuf just got a MASSIVE UPDATE.

Thanks to your patience, I was able
to put on an amazing update.
This updates includes a lot of fun things!

Without any further ado, have fun! :)

(open URL to check devlogs)
I am currently trying to fix
an issue due to kanjis not displaying
correctly. As of right now, announcements will be
in English.
